hero.headline:
Your Backyard Deserves a Resort-Quality
Transformation
hero.subheadline: From custom pools to outdoor kitchens, Outdoor Innovations brings architects, builders, and artisans together under one roof. You dream it, we design and build it -- so you can focus on making memories.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Luxury Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Built for Minnesota
services.subtitle: Stop imagining your dream backyard and start living in it. From pools to pergolas, we handle every detail so you get a seamless, stunning result.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Resort-quality swimming pools designed specifically for Minnesota climates. From lap pools to freeform oases, we build your perfect backyard escape.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining spaces with custom cabinetry, built-in grills, and bar setups designed for year-round Minnesota enjoyment.

cards.title: Pool Houses & Structures
cards.description: Stylish, functional pool houses that complement your outdoor space with changing areas, storage, and covered entertaining zones.

cards.title: Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: ICPI-certified paver installation for patios, walkways, and driveways. Premium materials and expert craftsmanship that lasts decades.

cards.title: Pergolas & Shade Structures
cards.description: Architectural pergolas and gazebos that add character, shade, and definition to your outdoor living areas. Custom-built for your space.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that add warmth and tranquility. The finishing touches that make a backyard unforgettable.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Design Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. Our landscape architects visit your property, listen to your ideas, and provide a detailed design concept -- no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It All
steps.description: Our in-house team of architects, builders, and artisans handle everything from blueprints to final walkthrough. One team, one vision, zero hassle.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Retreat
steps.description: Your backyard becomes the place where memories happen. Whether it is a pool party, quiet evening by the fire, or a family dinner under the pergola -- it is all yours.

about.label: Why Twin Cities Families Choose Us
about.headline: Two Landscape Pros. One Unstoppable Team.
about.description: Co-founded in 2007 by Asher Judd and Craig Palmer, Outdoor Innovations brings together decades of combined landscape architecture and construction experience. With headquarters in Hugo and Excelsior, we have spent 19 years transforming Midwestern backyards into luxury outdoor living spaces. Our full design-build model means architects, builders, and artisans all work under one roof -- delivering cohesive results that lesser approaches simply cannot match.

features.title: Full Design-Build Under One Roof
features.description: Architects, builders, and artisans collaborate seamlessly on every project. No subcontractor confusion, no finger-pointing -- just cohesive results.

features.title: Minnesota Climate Specialists
features.description: Every material, every design choice, every installation method is selected for our freeze-thaw cycles and seasonal demands. Built to last here.

features.title: Personalized From Start to Finish
features.description: Your dedicated project lead keeps you informed from initial concept through final walkthrough. Your vision drives every decision we make.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom, so we provide detailed proposals upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games -- just honest numbers you can plan around.

guarantee.headline: Our "Dream Backyard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project does not meet the standard we promised, we will make it right at our expense. We stand behind every paver, every beam, and every tile because our reputation is built on your satisfaction. That is how we have thrived for 19 years.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool or outdoor living project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A custom pool typically takes 8-12 weeks from breaking ground. Patios and hardscaping projects can be completed in 1-3 weeks. During your design consultation, we provide a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and HOA approvals?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As certified general contractors, we manage all permits, inspections, and HOA submissions. You should not have to navigate bureaucracy -- that is our job, and we handle it every day.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing landscape or pool?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many of our projects involve enhancing or renovating existing outdoor spaces. Whether you want to add a pool house to your current pool area or redesign your entire backyard, we tailor every project to what is already there.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Hugo, Excelsior, Dellwood, North Oaks, Grant, Eagan, Hudson WI, Orono, Lake Elmo, Saint Paul, Stillwater, Mendota Heights, Minnetonka, Woodbury, and the greater Twin Cities metro area.

faqs.question: Why choose a design-build firm over separate contractors?
faqs.answer: With separate contractors, you end up managing timelines, resolving conflicts, and hoping everything aligns. Our design-build model means one team owns the entire project from concept to completion -- saving you time, money, and headaches.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher created an exceptional landscape design for our pool placement and hardscape that organically flowed with our home, deck, and yard. He thoughtfully and artistically placed each piece with care. The result is absolutely stunning.

testimonials.name: Nathan M.
testimonials.text: The professionalism and dedication from the Outdoor Innovations team were truly remarkable. Casey and Tiano delivered outstanding results that exceeded every expectation we had. Could not recommend them more highly.

testimonials.name: Karen M.
testimonials.text: From the initial design to completion, the professionalism and expertise were evident every step of the way. The results exceeded our expectations and our backyard has become our favorite room in the house.
